channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Election-cycle spending and global shocks both driving Australia's inflation rise
item.description: The article argues that Australia’s recent rise in inflation cannot be explained solely by external global pressures such as geopolitical tensions involving Donald Trump or instability linked to Iran....

item.title: Glovo Announces Sh10 Billion Investment in Kenya by 2030 as Operations Expand
item.description: Glovo, the popular delivery platform, has revealed big plans to invest Sh10 billion in Kenya by the year 2030. This announcement came during the official opening of their new headquarters in Nairobi, ...

item.title: Parliament ramps up oversight on Sasol amid environmental pollution allegations and whistleblower protections
item.description: The parliamentary portfolio committee on forestry, fisheries and the environment has intensified its oversight of Sasol following protected disclosures by environmental whistleblower Ian Erasmus. Eras...

item.title: Lacson points out Marcoleta's non-denial of P500-M DPWH fund request
item.description: Senator Panfilo Lacson highlighted that Senator Rodante Marcoleta did not explicitly deny an alleged handwritten note from the late DPWH official Catalina Cabral, which reportedly indicated a request ...

item.title: Lubiprostone May Help Slow Kidney Function Decline in CKD Patients
item.description: Researchers at Tohoku University have discovered that lubiprostone, a medication typically used to treat constipation, may also help slow the progression of chronic kidney disease (CKD). In a clinical...

item.title: Oshiomhole demands Akpabio resignation over controversial Senate rules amendment
item.description: Na serious matter wey dey happen for Nigerian Senate as Senator Adams Oshiomhole don call on Senate President Godswill Akpabio to resign immediately. The Edo North senator talk say the new rules wey d...

item.title: Rising Fuel Costs Affect Iloilo’s Tourism Industry
item.description: The tourism sector in Iloilo is currently facing challenges due to recent increases in oil prices, which have affected transportation costs and travel affordability. Local tour operators and transport...

item.title: Visa Reports 20% Increase in Consumer Spending During Ramadan and Eid in Nigeria
item.description: Visa don release their latest insight on how people dey spend during Ramadan and Eid Al-Fitr for Nigeria. Their report show say spending with Visa premium cards don climb 20% compared to last year, ma...

item.title: Conservative Party Leadership Discussions Hint at Potential New Faces
item.description: During the recent Canada Strong and Free Network conference in Ottawa, Pierre Poilievre delivered a speech that was generally well-received but drew attention for its familiar themes from last year’s ...

item.title: Four Canadians among passengers on hantavirus-affected cruise ship in the Canary Islands; consular support provided
item.description: Consular officials from Canada are travelling to the Canary Islands to meet with four Canadians who remain aboard the MV Hondius, a cruise ship affected by an outbreak of the Andes strain of hantaviru...

item.title: Cartoon Comedian Shares Video While Pregnant, Sparking Social Media Reactions
item.description: Kenyan social media is buzzing after Rotimi of Africa, the baby daddy of Cartoon Comedian, shared a video of her heavily pregnant. According to the video, Cartoon was relaxed on a couch in a lovely ye...

item.title: Police Officer Dies, Another Wounded During Surigao City Anti-Drug Operation
item.description: In Surigao City, a police operation against illegal drugs went tragically wrong on the night of May 6, 2026, when a shabu peddler managed to seize the firearm of Staff Sgt. Charito Gepulla and fatally...

item.title: Sowore ordered to enter defence after court dismisses his no-case plea in Tinubu insult trial
item.description: For Abuja, the Federal High Court don dismiss the no-case submission wey Omoyele Sowore, the Sahara Reporters publisher, file for him ongoing cyberbullying trial. The case dey follow after Sowore post...

item.title: Trump instructs Rubio to communicate concerns about Iran's nuclear programme to the Pope
item.description: Former President Donald Trump has repeatedly claimed that Pope Francis supports Iran developing nuclear weapons, a statement that is factually incorrect. Trump instructed Senator Marco Rubio to delive...

item.title: Petrol and Diesel Prices Increased by Government Effective May 9, 2026
item.description: On Friday, the Government of Pakistan announced a significant increase in the prices of petrol and high-speed diesel (HSD). Petrol price has gone up by Rs14.92 per litre, bringing it to Rs414.78 per l...

item.title: Trump posts on Truth Social about Iran conflict and upcoming 80th birthday
item.description: Early on Friday morning, former President Donald Trump conducted a series of posts on his social media platform, Truth Social, sharing AI-generated images and commentary relating to the ongoing confli...

item.title: US and Iran clash in the Strait of Hormuz amid ongoing negotiations
item.description: Tensions flared between the US and Iran after an exchange of fire in the Strait of Hormuz. The US reported that Iranian forces launched missiles, drones, and small boats against three American guided-...

item.title: Sir David Attenborough Celebrates 100 Years of Bringing Nature to Life
item.description: Sir David Attenborough, the iconic BBC naturalist, celebrates his 100th birthday this May. Over a career spanning more than half a century, he has introduced generations of viewers to the wonders of t...

item.title: Celebrating Sir David Attenborough’s Century of Impact on Australian Wildlife and Conservation
item.description: Sir David Attenborough marked his 100th birthday on Friday, prompting tributes from across Australia and around the globe. Over a career spanning more than seven decades, Attenborough has become a rev...

item.title: Alberta Premier urges swift finalization of pipeline and carbon pricing agreement with Ottawa
item.description: Alberta Premier Danielle Smith has expressed concern over delays in finalizing the energy deal signed last November with Prime Minister Mark Carney. Speaking to media before a meeting with Carney, Smi...
